meaning: n.装置,设计,图案,策略,发明物,设备 [计]安装设备驱动程序
examples: The device is fixed to a post.
The device was protected by patent.
The device draws gas along the pipe.
One such device was found by Theo while supporting 11 Platoon 1 Royal Irish Regiment.
The device looks like a long sheath with two soft rings at each end.
